{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/nimbusite/base.png
|block_health=40
|block_resistance=4
|tool=Pickaxe
|durability=80
|mass_damage=1
|hardness_damage=3.9
|swing_speed=4.8
|tags=stone, nimbusite
|modifiers=good_at
}}
Nimbusite is a stone exclusive to the sky islands.

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}
Nimbusite is able to be used in tool crafting.

Nimbusite can be crafted into bricks, tiles, and walls for decorative purposes. 

== History ==

* [[0.2.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Stone]]
